consentDescription: We use cookies to enhance website functionality, analyze traffic, and improve your browsing experience. For more information on how we use cookies and process personal data, please see our <link>Privacy Policy</link>. You can choose to accept all cookies, reject non-essential cookies, or manage your preferences.
sectionIntroDescription: Cookie categories help us keep the website secure, measure usage, and enable optional features.
sectionNecessaryDescription: Required for core site behavior and cannot be disabled.
sectionAnalyticsDescription: Help us understand usage patterns and improve product experience.
sectionAdvertisingDescription: Enable campaign measurement and marketing attribution.
sectionFunctionalityDescription: Enable optional widgets and enhanced product interactions.
customerServiceConsentSubTitle: Your consent is required for the Cookie category: Functional Enhancement
customerServiceConsentDescription: To ensure that online customer service can open normally and maintain session and message status, we need to enable functional enhancement cookies. This consent applies only to this category and will not simultaneously enable analytics or advertising/marketing cookies.
reviewsConsentSubTitle: Your consent is required for the Cookie category: Functional Enhancement
reviewsConsentDescription: To display customer reviews, we need to enable functional enhancement cookies for the Yotpo review widget. This consent applies only to this category and will not simultaneously enable analytics or advertising/marketing cookies.
reviewsConsentFallbackDescription: Customer reviews are available after enabling functional enhancement cookies.
